Climate-driven damages across socioeconomic scenarios for the year 2090.
Damages in the Northern Plains region include sectors such as Wildfire, Roads, Rail, and Temperature.
Damages in the Midwest region include sectors such as Labor, Rail, Agriculture, and Temperature.
Damages in the Northeast region include sectors such as Roads, Rail, Temperature, and Air Quality.
Damages in the Southeast region include sectors such as Roads, Temperature, Labor, and Air Quality.
Damages in the Southwest region include sectors such as Wildfire, Roads, Air Quality, and Temperature.
Damages in the Southern Plains region include sectors such as Labor, Wind Damage, Rail, and High Tide Flooding (HTF).
